overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character leaving a neon-lit bar and walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The scene features heavy rainfall, vibrant pink and cyan neon lights reflecting off wet pavement, towering holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with curved neon counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar interior toward the exit, passing by the curved counter and delivery boxes

notable_agents.action: bartender in pink shirt standing behind the counter preparing drinks
patron with purple hair sitting at the bar using a handheld device

entered.detail: glowing white curved counter with pink neon underlighting
ceiling with grid-patterned cyan neon light panels
stacked cardboard boxes with shipping labels on the floor
wall-mounted screen displaying menu items and advertisements
glass wall separating the bar from the exterior street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic cyberpunk bar with a curved white counter illuminated by pink neon lights. The ceiling features a grid of cyan neon panels. Cardboard delivery boxes sit on the floor to the left, and a digital menu screen is mounted on the wall. The bartender and a patron are visible as the camera walks steadily toward the glass exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban plaza with neon canopy structures

events.description: exits the bar through glass doors into the heavy rain and neon-lit plaza

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the bar into the rainy night, immediately exposed to the downpour

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a glowing purple umbrella walking across the plaza

entered.detail: open plaza area with heavy rain falling and neon reflections on wet ground
tall cylindrical building covered in layered digital advertisements
overhead structure with bright pink neon tube lighting
rain-soaked pavement reflecting pink and cyan neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bar into a heavy downpour, transitioning from the enclosed interior to the open neon-lit plaza. Rain streaks across the view as the character walks across wet pavement that reflects the vibrant pink and cyan lights. A cylindrical tower covered in advertisements rises in the distance, and pedestrians with umbrellas move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a stairway entrance, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella walking perpendicular to the camera path

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisements displaying product images
building exteriors illuminated with bright neon signage
concrete seating areas along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the open plaza, passing holographic billboards and neon-lit building facades. The rain persists, creating ripples and reflections on the tiled ground. The cylindrical advertisement tower shifts to the left as the camera approaches a stairway entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway between tall buildings with vertical neon lights

events.description: begins ascending the wide outdoor concrete stairs toward the upper city level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs alongside other pedestrians while looking up at towering advertisements above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit climbing the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide staircase with red side walls leading upward between buildings
tall vertical strip of intense pink neon light running up the building facade
circular structure with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens
large glowing green holographic figure floating above the upper level

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a wide outdoor staircase flanked by red structural walls and vertical pink neon lights. Rain continues to fall as the camera climbs toward a massive cylindrical advertisement column and a glowing green holographic statue visible at the top. Other pedestrians climb ahead, and the view opens up to the upper city level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city plaza with potted trees and digital storefronts

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and continues walking through the upper plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper city level past digital billboards and neon storefronts, approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking along the right side of the street

entered.detail: decorative trees in large pink cylindrical planters
massive vertical screen displaying a face with text advertisement
building entrance with bright pink and blue neon signage
illuminated traffic signal showing green light at street intersection

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character walks through a plaza lined with potted trees in pink planters and large digital billboards. The rain creates reflective pools on the pavement as the camera passes neon storefronts and approaches a street intersection with a visible traffic light. The environment remains densely packed with futuristic architecture and glowing advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the enclosed neon glow of a cyberpunk bar into the expansive, rain-drenched architecture of a futuristic city. It begins inside a bar characterized by a curved white counter and cyan ceiling panels, moving steadily past a digital menu toward the glass exit. As the camera steps outside, the environment opens into a wide plaza where heavy rain streaks the view and vibrant pink and cyan lights reflect off the wet pavement. The scene then shifts as the character passes holographic billboards and approaches a wide outdoor staircase, ascending between red structural walls toward a massive advertisement column and a glowing green holographic statue. Finally, the camera reaches the upper city level, moving through a plaza of pink planters and digital billboards toward a busy street intersection under the persistent downpour.
